notes: In-game 'Sorcery Scaling' readings from user screenshots (2026-07-17). Character: Recluse, level 13 (badge visible). Weapon: Lusat's Glintstone Staff. CONTRADICTS our _scaling_factor (168 computed vs 221 displayed at +0; our +1 row shows NO change vs 243 in-game -> two bugs: (a) the scaling formula misses a term or an AEC gate (likely Faith also scales byMagic on this staff), (b) the staff reinforce ladder lookup returns the +0 row for +1). ALSO: the same staff model dropped with DIFFERENT slot-2 spells (Stars of Ruin + Full Moon on one copy, + Rykard's Rancor on another) — neither slot-2 spell appears in our 6 custom instances of Lusat's (Gavel/Cannon of Haima, Night Maiden's Mist): the real slot-2 roll pool is WIDER than the custom-instance list; likely resolved through ItemLotParam (loot backlog).

measurements.verdict: slot-2 rolls from a wider pool than our custom instances

measurements.note: CLEAN SESSION (2026-07-17 evening): Recluse level 15, ZERO relics equipped, R1 casts on a target. Our computed scaling factor is 177 for BOTH staves (correctMagic=100 each, ladders rate=1.0) yet the game shows 223 vs 211 -> a PER-STAFF term we don't model (likely the staff's resident SpEffect passive, e.g. Lusat's sorcery boost via spEffectBehaviorId). Damage model check pending a MONO-HIT spell measure (Pebble, checklist A1) — multi-hit totals can't isolate SPELL_FACTOR (unknown how many projectiles connected).

GOLDEN MEASURE (2026-07-17 late): Glintstone Arc (mono-hit, base 148) R2 through the base Glintstone Staff (displayed Sorcery Scaling 159, ladder rate 1.0), Recluse 15, no relics -> 141 displayed. F = 141/(148*1.59) = 0.599 ~= AR_FACTOR 0.596: THE SPELL CONSTANT IS THE WEAPON CONSTANT. Also fixes the internal stat term: our _scaling_factor 177 vs true 159 -> SPELL_SCALING_CORRECTION=0.897 (single-point at INT51/FAI51). Cross-checks at this F: Stars of Ruin 480 => 12 connected stars (the spell fires 12), Rancorcall 342 => ~6 hits (our count of 4 is low), Night Comet 123 => effective base ~153 (our 237 is wrong — resolver bug on that spell's tree). SPELL_FACTOR_CALIBRATED=True.

measurements.verdict: MODEL VALIDATED on a second independent point (0.9% off)
